name: Pecan Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch glass pie pan.
2. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually fold in the sugar, baking powder, and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Gently incorporate the cracker crumbs and chopped pecans into the mixture.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pie pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
7. Serve with whipped cream. Yield: 6-8 servings.
